LongMethod:ViewHierarchyScreen.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun ViewHierarchyScreen( rootNode: ViewNode?, viewCount: Int, maxDepth: Int, captureTimestamp: Long, selectedNode: ViewNode?, searchQuery: String, expandedNodeIds: Set<Int>, is3DMode: Boolean, onSearchQueryChanged: (String) -> Unit, onNodeSelected: (ViewNode) -> Unit, onDismissDetail: () -> Unit, onToggleNodeExpanded: (Int) -> Unit, onExpandAll: () -> Unit, onCollapseAll: () -> Unit, onToggle3DMode: () -> Unit, onClear: () -> Unit, onBack: (() -> Unit)?, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

LongParameterList:ViewHierarchyScreen.kt$( rootNode: ViewNode?, viewCount: Int, maxDepth: Int, captureTimestamp: Long, selectedNode: ViewNode?, searchQuery: String, expandedNodeIds: Set<Int>, is3DMode: Boolean, onSearchQueryChanged: (String) -> Unit, onNodeSelected: (ViewNode) -> Unit, onDismissDetail: () -> Unit, onToggleNodeExpanded: (Int) -> Unit, onExpandAll: () -> Unit, onCollapseAll: () -> Unit, onToggle3DMode: () -> Unit, onClear: () -> Unit, onBack: (() -> Unit)?, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, )

UndocumentedPublicProperty:ViewHierarchyViewModel.kt$ViewHierarchyViewModel$// Capture timestamp val captureTimestamp: StateFlow<Long> = engine.captureTimestamp .stateIn( viewModelScope, SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000), 0L, )

UndocumentedPublicProperty:ViewHierarchyViewModel.kt$ViewHierarchyViewModel$// Flattened list of all nodes for search val allNodes: StateFlow<List<ViewNode>> = engine.rootNode .map { root -> if (root != null) flattenHierarchy(root) else emptyList() } .stateIn( viewModelScope, SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000), emptyList(), )

UndocumentedPublicProperty:ViewHierarchyViewModel.kt$ViewHierarchyViewModel$// Maximum depth val maxDepth: StateFlow<Int> = engine.maxDepth .stateIn( viewModelScope, SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000), 0, )

UndocumentedPublicProperty:ViewHierarchyViewModel.kt$ViewHierarchyViewModel$// Root node of the captured hierarchy val rootNode: StateFlow<ViewNode?> = engine.rootNode .stateIn( viewModelScope, SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000), null, )

UndocumentedPublicProperty:ViewHierarchyViewModel.kt$ViewHierarchyViewModel$// Total view count val viewCount: StateFlow<Int> = engine.viewCount .stateIn( viewModelScope, SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000), 0, )
